title: Distrito 11
description: Promotional campaigns and digital content for the brand's positioning, events and commercial communication.
challenge: Adapting the brand's visual language to multiple formats and contexts — positioning, events, commercial communication — without losing hierarchy, recognition or coherence.
objective: Position the brand through consistent promotional campaigns and digital content across all its channels.
role: Advertising Designer and Brand Strategy: design of promotional campaigns and digital content for positioning, events and commercial communication.
strategy: A visual language with clear hierarchy and recognition rules, applied with judgment across every format and touchpoint.

process.title: Visual language
process.description: Defining the hierarchy, color and composition rules of the brand's communication.

process.title: Promotional campaigns
process.description: Design of campaigns and digital content for positioning, events and promotions.

process.title: Multi-format adaptation
process.description: Translating the system to each format while keeping recognition and coherence.

results.summary: Two years of commercial communication with a brand that stayed recognizable and coherent across every format.

seo.title: Distrito 11 — Case study · Adrián D. Bonilla
seo.description: Advertising design and brand strategy for Distrito 11: promotional campaigns and digital content (2020–2022).
